prompt: Warren keeps asking me about my tax situation before running his weekly review, and I always give him the same context — I'm W-2 with some freelance income, filing jointly. Can we make that part of his permanent setup so he doesn't need to ask every time?

assertions.description: Recommends adding tax context to profile.md (stable fact), not MEMORY.md
Does NOT suggest MEMORY.md as the primary or only solution
Provides actual text/content to add, not just vague direction
Distinguishes between profile.md (the data) vs CLAUDE.md rule (behavioral: never ask about this)
